meaning: n.锯木匠,漂流水中的树木,[昆]显赫天牛(其幼虫钻木为穴)
examples: Was it Tom Sawyer that found it?
Pity but somebody could find Tom Sawyer!
It is almost impossible not to develop a rooting interest for the clever, rascally, Tom Sawyer.
Shaun Sawyer was approved unanimously by the Police and Crime Panel to take up the post.
